'''âw-dh-t-th''' ('''kawadhtethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joggle|joggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joggle|joggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-dh-t-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawadhtethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhtethoko|thiwadhtethoko]] || [[word:jiwadhtethoko|jiwadhtethoko]] || [[word:shiwadhtethoko|shiwadhtethoko]] || [[word:kiwadhtethoko|kiwadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhtethoko|thuthuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:jujuwadhtethoko|jujuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:shushuwadhtethoko|shushuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:kukuwadhtethoko|kukuwadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwadhtethoko|thuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:juwadhtethoko|juwadhtethoko]] || [[word:shuwadhtethoko|shuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:kuwadhtethoko|kuwadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwadhtethoko|thuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:juwadhtethoko|juwadhtethoko]] || [[word:shuwadhtethoko|shuwadhtethoko]] || [[word:kuwadhtethoko|kuwadhtethoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhtethoko|thowadhtethoko]] || [[word:jowadhtethoko|jowadhtethoko]] || [[word:showadhtethoko|showadhtethoko]] || [[word:kowadhtethoko|kowadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhtethoko|thowadhtethoko]] || [[word:jowadhtethoko|jowadhtethoko]] || [[word:showadhtethoko|showadhtethoko]] || [[word:kowadhtethoko|kowadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadhtethoko|thĂŠwadhtethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwadhtethoko|jĂŠwadhtethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwadhtethoko|shĂŠwadhtethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwadhtethoko|kĂŠwadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawadhtethoko|thathawadhtethoko]] || [[word:jajawadhtethoko|jajawadhtethoko]] || [[word:shashawadhtethoko|shashawadhtethoko]] || [[word:kakawadhtethoko|kakawadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawadhtethoko|thawadhtethoko]] || [[word:jawadhtethoko|jawadhtethoko]] || [[word:shawadhtethoko|shawadhtethoko]] || [[word:kawadhtethoko|kawadhtethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhtethoko|thawadhtethoko]] || [[word:jawadhtethoko|jawadhtethoko]] || [[word:shawadhtethoko|shawadhtethoko]] || [[word:kawadhtethoko|kawadhtethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
